question: New car or used car — which is the smarter financial decision in 2026?

chatgpt.reason: New cars depreciate 20-25% immediately and up to 50% over time, while used cars avoid steep depreciation losses.
chatgpt.raw:
VERDICT: Used car usually smarter financially
REASON: New cars lose 20–25% instantly and up to ~50% in a few years, while used cars avoid that steep depreciation and cost far less overall imgglow.com+1

perplexity.reason: Lower financing rates and predictable costs in 2026 favor purchasing a new car.
perplexity.raw: VERDICT: New car can be smarterREASON: Lower financing rates and predictable costs favor new in 2026.

gemini.reason: Used cars sidestep the steep depreciation hit that new cars experience.
gemini.raw: VERDICT: Used car avoids steep depreciation.

consensus.label: moderate
consensus.summary: ChatGPT and Gemini agree used cars are financially smarter due to depreciation avoidance, while Perplexity argues new cars can be better due to favorable 2026 financing rates and predictable costs.
